title: Creamy Middle-Eastern Buckwheat Pilaf
description: A nutty, creamy buckwheat pilaf with aromatic spices and tender vegetables, perfect for a crowd-pleasing meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Sauté onion and garlic until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add buckwheat and stir to coat in oil.
Pour in 2 cups water and 1 teaspoon cumin, then bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15 minutes until buckwheat is tender.
Add 1 cup cooked chickpeas (optional for extra creaminess) and mix well.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve.
